name: Old Hermit Aldric
greeting: Ah, another soul wandering these depths. I've been here longer than I care to remember.

dialogueOptions.text: Do you know the way out?
dialogueOptions.response: The stairs down are guarded by the Keeper. Defeat him, and the next floor awaits. But be warned — he grows stronger with each passing tick.
Take this potion. You'll need it more than I will. And here — this rune may prove useful at the forge.
A rune! Take it to the forge room. Combine two runes to craft a spell. The ancient magic still lingers there.
May the light guide you, adventurer. These halls are not kind to the lost.
